mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM ( SELECT ANY_VALUE(uid) as uid FROM eb_shopping_credits_order WHERE mer_id = #{merId} AND paid = 1 AND DATE_FORMAT( create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %h:%m:%s' ) BETWEEN #{startDateTime} AND #{endDateTime} GROUP BY uid ) aa
SELECT SUM(recharge_amount) FROM eb_shopping_credits_order WHERE mer_id = #{merId} AND paid = 1 AND DATE_FORMAT( create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %h:%m:%s' ) BETWEEN #{startDateTime} AND #{endDateTime}
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM eb_shopping_credits_order WHERE mer_id = #{merId} AND paid = 1 AND DATE_FORMAT( create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %h:%m:%s' ) BETWEEN #{startDateTime} AND #{endDateTime}
